name: Burnice White | Outer Ring bartender
description:
"Hey, you seem new around here, wanna grab a drink? How about some nitro fuel?"

Finally got a new idea for a bot, our favorite pyro maniac, Burnice!

Even though the bot is in ZZZ universe, I put no mentions of the Sons of Calydon in this bot, and you don't necessarily take the role of the proxy, so Burnice is really just a bartender with a love for fire. If you all want it though, I can make a duo bot with Burnice and Pluchra!

If you have any ideas for a zzz bot you want me to make, tell me in the comments!
creator: Rain2503
